creator: silb@silb.no
text:
Created attachment 151386
SVN diff for upgrading audio/beets from 1.3.9 to 1.3.10

See the changelog for Beets 1.3.10 [1]

* Support the new PlexUpdate plugin [2]
* The new option LYRICS_GOOGLE_DESC is optional for the lyrics plugin [3]
* For easier maintenance, Makefile options are sorted alphabetically

[1] http://beets.readthedocs.org/en/v1.3.10/changelog.html
[2] http://beets.readthedocs.org/en/v1.3.10/plugins/plexupdate.html
[3] http://beets.readthedocs.org/en/v1.3.10/plugins/lyrics.html#activate-google-custom-search
